name: figma
description: Assist with Figma files, components, variables, and Dev Mode handoff using the Figma REST API and design context.

interface.shortDescription: Figma files, components, and API workflows
interface.longDescription: Helps inspect Figma structure, tokens, and assets, and align implementation with Dev Mode and the Figma REST API.
defaultPrompt: Summarize this Figma file structure and key components.
Extract spacing and typography tokens from the selection.
Compare this frame to our code and list mismatches.
